allow: Bash(xcodebuild -project checkpoint.xcodeproj -scheme checkpoint -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO -quiet)
Bash(xcodebuild -project checkpoint.xcodeproj -scheme checkpoint -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 15 Pro' -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO)
Bash(xcodebuild -project checkpoint.xcodeproj -scheme checkpoint -sdk iphonesimulator -destination 'generic/platform=iOS Simulator' -configuration Debug build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO)
